cases.prompt: Cursor sessionStart fires for this repository; chained hooks from `.cursor/hooks.json` run `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --full` followed by `python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-session-start.py` before normal chat resumes.
assertions: After sessionStart invokes `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --full`, exit status was 0 and stdout carried a JSON object matching the Cursor hook channel contract.
The subsequent `python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-session-start.py` step exited with status 0 while stdout stayed strict JSON documenting optional compression or memory reminders.
no askQuestion was emitted from those hook binaries.

primitive_analysis.summary: This workspace hooks bundle wires sessionStart, afterFileEdit, and stop Cursor phases to chained local Node sync scripts and CRUX Python helpers for plugin mirrors and bookkeeping, with no operator Q&A contract.

cases.expected_output: Both commands exit successfully; mirror sync finishes quietly and the CRUX helper prints advisory JSON lines (or `{}`) Cursor can ingest without modal prompts.

cases.prompt: afterFileEdit lifecycle event edits `workspace/plugins/zoto-eval-system/commands/z-eval-help.md`; Cursor runs the three-hook sequence from `.cursor/hooks.json`: `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --incremental`, `python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-detect-changes.py`, then `python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-detect-memory-changes.py`, each consuming the stdin file payload Cursor attaches.
assertions: Incremental `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --incremental` completed with exit status 0 while emitting hook-channel JSON stdout.
`python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-detect-changes.py` finished with exit status 0 without raising uncaught interpreter errors after ingesting Cursor's JSON stdin line containing `file_path`.
`python3 .cursor/hooks/crux-detect-memory-changes.py` exited with status 0 and honored the documented `.memory.md` staleness signalling path when edits target configured memory-backed files.
no askQuestion was emitted from any afterFileEdit hook subprocess.

primitive_analysis.summary: This workspace hooks bundle wires sessionStart, afterFileEdit, and stop Cursor phases to chained local Node sync scripts and CRUX Python helpers for plugin mirrors and bookkeeping, with no operator Q&A contract.

cases.expected_output: Incremental sync updates the mirrored plugin artefacts, queues eligible CR-marked markdown for compression bookkeeping, and flags memory index staleness paths when applicable—all without prompting the operator in chat.

cases.prompt: Cursor stop fires as the IDE session shuts down; `.cursor/hooks.json` executes `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --full` for the concluding mirror synchronization pass.
assertions: `node .cursor/hooks/sync-plugins.mjs --full` under the stop phase returned exit status 0.
Stdout from that stop invocation was a JSON object readable by Cursor's hook ingestion layer.
no askQuestion was emitted from the stop hook subprocess.
